diagrams.title: Invertible Transformation Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between domain V, codomain W, and how invertible T maps uniquely to inverse T⁻¹
elements: Inverse T⁻¹ mapping back from w to v
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how invertible transformations work as reversible mappings between vector spaces

diagrams.title: Rank-Nullity Decomposition
diagrams.description: Illustrates the decomposition of domain V into null space and its complement, mapping to range
elements: Arrow showing T maps complement isomorphically to range
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Rank-Nullity theorem divides the domain into recoverable and lost information

diagrams.title: Invertibility Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Flowchart for determining if a linear transformation is invertible
elements: Yes → Invertible (for square matrices, one implies other)
diagrams.purpose: Step-by-step approach to determine invertibility of linear transformations

visuals.title: Invertible Linear Transformations
visuals.description: Visual diagram for invertible linear transformations
